title: Link drop down features in Forms
excerpt: Is it possible to tie together two different drop down menus in a form? I have a “Company” drop down and a “Site Location” drop down and will like to link the information together so that when a Company is selected, the …

posts.author: jgore (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to tie together two different drop down menus in a form? I have a “Company” drop down and a “Site Location” drop down and will like to link the information together so that when a Company is selected, the site location is automatically populated as well.
